data.name: Succubus Challenge
data.detailed_description:
Did you ever experienced the feeling of being challenged by a succubus? Now it’s time to fight.
Succubus Challenge is basically a Rock - Paper - Scissors just with degenerate moves 2D Hentai game.
Battle a seductive succubus and fight back with cheeky moves like playful head pats to flip the fight in your favor!

Want a chill vibe or a real challenge? Pick your battle difficulty and play your way!

Each turn, your horny succubus strikes with temptation. fight back with the unholy trio: headpats, handholding, and kissing! That’s how you tame a demon.

Need a boost before the fight? Get handsy with the succubus and earn a juicy buff to tip the odds your way!

After each victory, you'll earn a score that unlocks new content and progression. Keep winning, and you'll unlock even more intimate scenes!


Did the description awaken your horny curiosity? If so, make sure to add the game to your wishlist so you’ll know exactly when it’s time to start the fight against this cheeky demon.

data.short_description: Battle a seductive succubus and fight back with cheeky moves like playful head pats to flip the fight in your favor!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間
